narrative:
Cols 86-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,986 registered voters, with 65.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.4 percentage points.
